notes: Visual theme follow-up after v4.3.187: adds approved background textures and a more dimensional button treatment while keeping the approved brown and green swatches.

Applies a subtle dappled-forest texture to the brown app background, a leaf-vein texture to medium green panels, a paper-fiber texture to light green detail surfaces, and gentle topographic-line texture to light-blue accent surfaces.
Gives buttons and navigation pills a rounded raised 3D look with slightly reduced text sizing so the controls stay balanced.
Updates the boot.js bundled version floor and index.html boot query so the version badge remains aligned with the installed package.
No species records, route/category logic, edible statuses, toxicity statuses, medicinal fields, image fields, map features, or home-page structure changed.
